title: Mastering the Scientific Narrative: A Practical Guide to Reading and Writing High-Impact AI Research Papers
description: A 90-minute hands-on Skill Session for the Deep Learning Indaba 2026, teaching African early-career AI researchers to read papers efficiently with Keshav's 3-Pass method and to write high-impact papers using a four-step blueprint (Frame, Core, Impact, Honesty), under the theme 'Sovereign Intelligence'.
